scenario.name: UAS Hold Resume - B-Leg
scenario.send:
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[pid]SIPpTag01[call_number] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:bob@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=bob 654321 654321 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=B2BUA Hold Test B-Leg c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:bob@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=bob 654321 654322 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=B2BUA Hold Test B-Leg c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=recvonly

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:bob@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=bob 654321 654323 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=B2BUA Hold Test B-Leg c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-16 a=sendrecv
